message.content:
@startuml
actor Test participant GrpcClient participant Front participant Edge participant HttpToGrpcMock note right of HttpToGrpcMock : Thinks is calling actual
external service note left of HttpToGrpcMock : Info about received request
is forwarded to tests note bottom of HttpToGrpcMock : Responding back front may not be necessary in most cases.
Maybe it would be database update or something like that activate "Test" #LightBlue;activate "Front";activate "Edge";activate "HttpToGrpcMock";activate "GrpcClient" == POST /send/post == ->> Front instruct to wait for /external/call --> GrpcClient Internal communication->> Edge http--> HttpToGrpcMock grpc<- - GrpcClient Assert request <-[hidden]-- Test Mocked response -->> HttpToGrpcMock ..<<-http.. <<--[hidden]- Front Resolve /send/post promise ....>- Test assert response <-[hidden]<== deactivate all @enduml
